column1: # mapping_set_title: 'OCSF to MITRE ATT&CK class mappings'
#   Class-level mappings between OCSF (Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework)
#   object classes and MITRE ATT&CK Data Model concepts. OCSF has first-class
#   support for ATT&CK references via Attack/Tactic/Technique/SubTechnique/
#   Mitigation objects, so the bulk of these are direct correspondences.

column8: OCSF Attack object wraps MITRE ATT&CK references; ATT&CK Attack Pattern is the canonical concept.
Direct correspondence; OCSF Tactic carries ATT&CK tactic id and name.
Direct correspondence; OCSF Mitigation references ATT&CK Mxxxx ids.
OCSF Campaign aligns with the ATT&CK Campaign object (introduced in v12).
KillChainPhase originates in STIX/Lockheed Martin and is referenced by ATT&CK; close not exact.
ATT&CK calls the analogous concept "Group"; semantically equivalent but named differently.
ATT&CK Software covers both Malware and Tool subtypes; Malware maps to one of two members.
